title: evolvulus jacobinus
intro: Evolvulus jacobinus, also known as blue pochette or blue eyes, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It is an annual herb native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. Evolvulus jacobinus has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for herbal remedies.
